'''Yang Metal Dog''' is the 47th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 庚 Kanoe (yang metal, the gaia-aligned face of occultation), and its branch is 戌 Inu, the [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's earth generates the stem's metal, feeding the heavens from below.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Earth Rooster]] (node 46) and [[Yin Metal Pig]] (node 48).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kanoe (庚)]] — yang metal
* '''Branch:''' [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog (戌)]] — yang earth
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' occultation

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Earth Rooster]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Metal Pig]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904484}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
